response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is overwhelmingly in full-stack web development, DevOps, and open-source tooling, with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or performance modeling for AI accelerators.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated ability to build and contribute to open-source infrastructure tools
Proven track record in performance-critical systems (e.g., low-latency DLang apps)
concerns: No experience with SoC, IP, or AI accelerator modeling as required
Lacks exposure to deep-learning workload optimization or GPU architecture
Education is a BS in CS — insufficient without 8+ years of relevant hardware-focused experience

key_factors.factor: No AI accelerator or deep-learning optimization background
